arts.ttl: Liverpool 4-0 Accrington: Match report & talking points as Chiesa scores first goal
arts.sum: Slot have proven during his brief time at Liverpool that he is not a manager who hands out first-team appearances lightly - just ask Federico Chiesa. Liverpool cruised into the fourth round of the FA Cup as they beat League Two Accrington Stanley 4-0 at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp spotted at first game as ex-Liverpool boss starts controversial new job
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp quit Liverpool last summer after a hugely successful spell at Anfield and after a period of time away from football he has returned with energy drinks manufacturers Red Bull

arts.ttl: Liverpool 4-0 Accrington Stanley: Rio Ngumoha's performance assessed as 16-year-old breaks Reds FA Cup record
arts.sum: Sports Mole analyses the performance of record-breaking teenager Rio Ngumoha in Liverpool's 4-0 win over Accrington Stanley in the FA Cup third round.

arts.ttl: Slot leaves door open for Chiesa’s exit despite first Liverpool goal
arts.sum: Arne Slot ‘won’t get carried away’ by Federico Chiesa’s first Liverpool goal against Accrington Stanley...

arts.ttl: Robbie Fowler launches brutal attack on Darwin Nunez: ‘He’s not a Liverpool player’
arts.sum: Robbie Fowler delivered his damning verdict on Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez, stating: “He’s not a Liverpool player”.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot brings Federico Chiesa back down to earth after Liverpool breakthrough
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Federico Chiesa scored his maiden Reds goal in the FA Cup win over Accrington Stanley, but Arne Slot has told fans they shouldn't be getting carried away

arts.ttl: 'Talk for hours' - Arne Slot hits back at Trent Alexander-Arnold critics and Liverpool transfer talk
arts.sum: Arne Slot believes criticism of Trent Alexander-Arnold after Liverpool's 2-2 draw with Manchester United was potentially amplified by the ongoing contract impasse

arts.ttl: Anfield reception ‘biggest compliment’ for Trent Alexander-Arnold – Arne Slot
arts.sum: The Liverpool manager praised the England international’s superb display in the FA Cup win over Accrington.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 4-0 Accrington: Player ratings as Reds secure FA Cup fourth round spot
arts.sum: Liverpool created the odd opportunity - Darwin Nunez scooping an effort over the bar following Trent Alexander-Arnold's testing drive - but Accrington held firm early in proceedings. The Reds broke quickly following an Accrington free kick and Diogo Jota converted from close range after an accurate low cross from Darwin Nunez.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot singles out Liverpool star for proving his point in Accrington win
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot took the time to praise Reds starlet Rio Nguhoma after the 16-year-old impressed in the 4-0 win over Accrington Stanley at Anfield
